name: holographicglasscard
title: Holographic Glass Card
description: A "God-Tier" Interactive Credit Card Display. Features: - Hybrid 3D Flip: Controlled via `isFlipped` prop for professional form integration. - Holographic Prism Foil: A light-reactive shimmer that shifts as the card tilts. - Matte Frosted Glass: Deep, multi-layered glassmorphic finish (Matte). - Isometric Parallax: Elastic 3D response to cursor position. - Smart Identification: Detects card network and rendering high-end SVG logos.
